title: SCHOOL’S OUT DAYS - 211info
text: ASHLAND FAMILY YMCA SCHOOL’S OUT DAYS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a day camp during conferences, holiday breaks, and in-service days. Participants are offered a wide range of activities, including swimming, active playtime in various settings, STEM projects, and arts and crafts. 540 YMCA Way Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Ages 3-12; most camp sessions serve ages 6-12 Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-6pm; camp times vary Email (541) 482-6922 308 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Person (541) 482-6922 ext 308 Keysha Porter [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Varies by session DOCUMENTS: Income verification if applying for scholarship AREA SERVED: Cities of Ashland, Phoenix, and Talent SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 5am-9pm, Saturday 8am-6pm, Sunday 9am-4pm Services: Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - PRESCHOOL INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - AFTER SCHOOL CARE LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - DEBOER SUMMER CAMP LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - GYMNASTICS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SWIMMING LESSONS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - YOUTH SPORTS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ASHLAND FAMILY YMCA
